title: Critical Point Analysis for Multivariable Functions
description: A flowchart showing the process for classifying critical points (maxima, minima, saddle points) of a function f(x,y) using second partial derivatives and the discriminant D.
relationships: Process flows sequentially from Start to finding Critical Points, then to calculating Second Partials, then to computing D. The result of D and f_xx then branches the flow to the final classification: Local Minimum, Local Maximum, Saddle Point, or Test Inconclusive.
